textByHash.05218295e5d03d69571e1aceb158c9c3dc7a1d85: Now though, she has changed everything. Now it is my duty to rejoin their ranks so that we may bring about the Final Dawn.
textByHash.731bc792dac1d774cd9f0eb65492a4599fdf10fc: You have not heard? She is the one who now leads the Emissaries. She has taken this once helpless collective and turned them into the ones who will guide us all to Mokhaiotl.
textByHash.82eeaef63d1fbfdcf46e59a4314e2399431b0060: Greetings, iknami. It's good to see so many who are willing to contribute to the Final Dawn. The word of the Augur has changed everything. The time to act is now.
textByHash.a5706d9d37e00244419dcdddd987e63445bdfc5f: I was once. In my time of need, I turned to the Emissaries, but they were even more helpless than I was.
